name: sim_rosetta_entropy_axis0_gtower_convergence

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: compute all three quantities (Carnot dS, GTower residual, FEP F) as differentiable functions; verify cosine similarity of gradients; autograd confirms all three share the same gradient direction = Axis 0

pyg.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

z3.reason: load-bearing: UNSAT proof that delta_S=0 AND gtower_residual>0 is impossible; both share the same zero (equilibrium); structural impossibility confirms Rosetta

cvc5.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

sympy.reason: load-bearing: symbolic derivation of delta_S=Q/T, residual, F=KL+H; verify all three satisfy same monotonicity: non-negative, zero at equilibrium, increasing with displacement from equilibrium

clifford.reason: load-bearing: represent all three gradient directions as grade-1 vectors in Cl(3,0); verify all are scalar multiples of e1 (same direction = Axis 0)

geomstats.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

e3nn.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: Rosetta convergence graph with 3 framework nodes + 1 Axis0 center; verify all three have directed edge to Axis0 (convergence structure)

xgi.reason: load-bearing: triple hyperedge {Carnot_dS, GTower_residual, FEP_F, Axis0}; the convergence is a 4-way relationship; hyperedge represents the Rosetta claim

toponetx.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

gudhi.reason: not used in this Rosetta convergence probe; deferred

P1_gradient_cosine_similarity.note: Spearman rank correlation: same monotone ordering = same axis (Rosetta = ordinal agreement)
P1_gradient_cosine_similarity.interpretation: all three quantities agree on ordering = same axis = Axis 0

P2_all_zero_at_equilibrium.interpretation: shared zero = shared equilibrium = Rosetta ground state

P3_all_positive_out_of_equilibrium.interpretation: shared positivity condition = same out-of-equilibrium criterion

P4_ranking_agreement.interpretation: all three frameworks rank configurations in the same order

P5_pearson_correlation.interpretation: strong linear co-variation = Rosetta signal confirmed

P6_sympy_monotonicity.interpretation: all three are zero at equilibrium and monotone increasing away from it

N1_different_scales_not_numerically_equa.interpretation: Rosetta means same structure, NOT same number; units differ

N2_shuffled_destroys_correlation.interpretation: co-variation is structural (same alpha), not accidental

N3_z3_unsat_ds0_residual_positive.interpretation: UNSAT: impossible for entropy=0 and GTower residual>0 simultaneously; they share the same zero

N4_fep_minimum_at_equilibrium.interpretation: F has a minimum at equilibrium (convex), not a maximum; equilibrium is stable

N5_carnot_efficiency_strictly_less_than_.interpretation: perfect efficiency forbidden for T_c>0; entropy floor is structural

B1_upper_bound_simultaneous.interpretation: all three reach upper bound together = shared ceiling

B2_lower_bound_simultaneous_zero.interpretation: shared lower bound at zero = same equilibrium structure

B3_clifford_all_along_e1.interpretation: all three gradient directions lie along e1 = Axis 0 in Clifford space

B4_rustworkx_rosetta_graph.interpretation: Rosetta graph structure: 3 frameworks converge to 1 Axis0 node

B5_xgi_rosetta_hyperedge.interpretation: 4-way hyperedge captures the Rosetta convergence claim

rosetta_claim: Carnot delta_S, G-tower residual, and FEP free energy are three views of the same object (Axis 0 = I_c = entropy gradient). They co-vary under the same transformations, share the same zero (equilibrium), and agree on ranking.
